overview.value: Calathea is grown for broad patterned leaves with pale striping. It prefers soft filtered light, stable warmth, and consistently moist soil.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Calathea","overview":"Calathea is grown for broad patterned leaves with pale striping. It prefers soft filtered light, stable warmth, and consistently moist soil.","tips":"Use filtered or rested water if leaf edges brown despite good humidity."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"圆叶竹芋","overview":"圆叶竹芋以宽大带浅色条纹的叶片为观赏重点。它喜欢柔和散射光、稳定温暖环境和持续微湿的土壤。","tips":"如果湿度合适但叶缘仍发黄发焦，可以改用过滤水或静置后的水。"}}
